title: UK Government to meet Swinney over US military use of Prestwick Airport amid Iran strikes

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: UK Government to meet Swinney over US military use of Prestwick Airport amid Iran strikes. The UK Government has agreed to meet Scotland's First Minister John Swinney to discuss US military use of Prestwick Airport.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – UK Government to meet Swinney over US military use of Prestwick Airport amid Iran strikes
